## What changed

## Test Plan
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test:core`
- [ ] `npm run test:diff-coverage`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` (if UI flow changed)

## Risk
- [ ] Low (isolated change, good test coverage)
- [ ] Medium (user-facing or multi-module change)
- [ ] High (touches core flows, data, or deployment)

## ExecPlan (required for non-trivial changes)
- Link:

## Release Notes (if user-facing)

## Agent Review
- [ ] Agent reviewed (Playwright MCP used if UI behavior changed)
- [ ] Human approval required before merge
